nasb.text: “You shall consecrate to the Lord your God all the firstborn males that are born of your herd and of your flock; you shall not work with the firstborn of your herd, nor shear the firstborn of your flock.

esv.text: “All the firstborn males that are born of your herd and flock you shall dedicate to the Lord your God. You shall do no work with the firstborn of your herd, nor shear the firstborn of your flock.

cnv.text: “你的牛群羊群中所生，是頭生雄性的，你都要把牠分別為聖歸給耶和華你的　神。你的牛群中頭生的，你不可用牠去耕田；你的羊群中頭生的，你不可給牠剪毛。

ccb.text: “你们要把头生的公牛和公羊分别出来，献给你们的上帝耶和华。不可用头生的公牛耕田，也不要剪头生公羊的毛。
